requirements.requirement: When Party Mode advisors respond, responses appear in the single conversation column with expert name, role, identity border, current round indicator, and non-color-only identity structure.

cases: [P0][5.3-BE-001][AC1,AC2] creates serial advisor messages with round, order, identity, current-speaker, and shared context metadata
[P1][5.3-BE-005][AC1,AC3] keeps provider and message metadata free of raw persona content and source paths
[P0][5.3-FE-001][AC1] renders expert identity with name, role, round, and non-color-only structure

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Covered indirectly through session message service and route/controller regressions; no standalone Party Mode page or endpoint added.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Tenant/session ownership and module availability are inherited from existing message service tests and Story 5.1 Party Mode start regressions.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Metadata privacy and source leakage are covered by backend ATDD; UI identity uses accessible roles/labels rather than color-only selectors.

requirements.requirement: While one advisor is responding, loading/streaming state clearly identifies the current speaker and users can keep reading/scrolling/selecting previous expert messages.

cases: [P0][5.3-BE-002][AC2] streams current-speaker events before each advisor response
[P0][5.3-BE-007][AC2] serializes concurrent Party Mode turns so rounds do not duplicate
[P0][5.3-FE-003][AC2] parses current-speaker metadata before advisor deltas
[P0][5.3-FE-005][AC2] treats a partial Party Mode stream as malformed until the final expert completes
[P0][5.3-FE-002][AC2] announces the current streaming expert by name and role in a polite live region
[P0][5.3-FE-006][AC2] removes completed Party Mode advisor messages when the same stream fails later

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Direct SSE contract is covered by backend controller stream tests and frontend stream parser tests.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Stream route continues to strip caller-supplied tenant fields and require NextAuth session token in route proxy tests.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Partial stream, backend stream error, abort cleanup, and UI rollback are covered.

requirements.requirement: When the user responds to a specific expert, the addressed expert deepens the point first and other advisors add relevant follow-up without losing shared context.
requirements.test_level: Backend service + frontend component/parser + API proxy

cases: [P0][5.3-BE-003][AC3] validates addressed expert replies and makes the addressed advisor speak first
[P0][5.3-BE-004][AC3] rejects forged, stale, or non-Party-Mode addressed expert references before persistence/provider calls
[P0][5.3-BE-006][AC3] rejects forged addressed expert references before streaming SSE starts
[P1][5.3-BE-005][AC1,AC3] keeps provider and message metadata free of raw persona content and source paths
[P0][5.3-FE-004][AC3] exposes an accessible reply action for a previous expert message
[P0][5.3-FE-004][AC3] sends addressed expert hint as server-validated advisor and message ids
[P0] proxies message submission without relaying caller-supplied tenant fields
[P0] forwards backend SSE bytes and strips caller-supplied tenant fields
[P1] converts backend stream startup failures to a safe JSON error

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Both message submit and stream proxy paths are covered; backend controller tests verify pre-stream validation can use normal HTTP exception handling.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Forged/stale expert references, tenant stripping, and session-scoped backend validation are covered.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Invalid advisor id, stale/non-Party-Mode addressed message id, pre-SSE validation, partial stream, and metadata leakage are covered.

recommendations.action: Keep Story 5.3 backend serial-turn, frontend stream parser, ChatMessage, WorkspaceShell, and route proxy tests in the Epic 5 regression set.

verification_commands: cd backend && npm run test -- src/modules/advisory/runtime --runInBand
cd frontend && npm run test -- components/advisory/AdvisoryChatMessage --runInBand
cd frontend && npm run test -- lib/advisory/streaming --runInBand
